info.title: BodySpec API
info.description:
This API allows BodySpec users to integrate their DEXA scan data with other platforms.

It is currently in early-access and we welcome feedback to help us improve it. For help with the API, please email us at dev-support@bodyspec.com

## Authentication

Most endpoints require authentication. BodySpec uses an OIDC-compliant authentication server that supports two authentication methods:

#### Option 1: OAuth2 (Recommended for interactive use)
Best for web applications and interactive API testing:

1. Click the "Authorize" button in the API documentation
2. You'll be redirected to BodySpec's Auth Portal to login
3. After successful login, you'll be redirected back with an access token
4. The token will be automatically used for API requests

#### Option 2: Partner Auth (For partner integrations only)
For authorized partner integrations:

1. Contact BodySpec to obtain partner credentials
2. Include credentials in the `Authorization` header: `Basic base64(partner_id:partner_secret)`

get.description: Get available appointment slots at a specific location. Use start_time filters to narrow results. Availability is limited to 24 hours through 120 days in the future.

post.description:
When scan results are ready for a user, BodySpec sends a POST request
with this payload to your registered webhook URL.

When a new reservation is created for a user, BodySpec sends a POST request
with this payload to your registered webhook URL.

IntakeDisqualifiers.title: IntakeDisqualifiers

IntakeQualifiers.title: IntakeQualifiers
IntakeQualifiers.description: Qualifier questions - at least one must be true.

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: PNG signature image, max 500KB. Provide as raw base64 or data URL (data:image/png;base64,...).

min_age.title: Min Age
min_age.description: Minimum age for percentile comparison range. Defaults to patient age minus 3, clamped to 20.

max_age.title: Max Age
max_age.description: Maximum age for percentile comparison range. Defaults to patient age plus 3, clamped to 80.

gender.title: Gender
gender.description: Patient gender for percentile comparison. Auto-detected from scan data if omitted.

handle.title: Handle
handle.description: Display name on the report. Defaults to the user's first name if omitted.

appts.title: Appts
appts.description: Appointment IDs to include as historical comparisons. Each ID must be a 32-character hex string. The current result is always included automatically. Defaults to all of the user's DEXA scans if omitted.

InteractiveFormatRequest.description: Request body for bodyspec_interactive export format.

UserResponse.title: User
UserResponse.description:
User model for API responses.

Note: This model intentionally excludes sensitive or internal fields like:
- is_admin: Admin status is determined from token claims, not exposed in responses
- created_at/updated_at: Internal timestamps not needed in public API

url.title: Url
url.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook events

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: Optional secret for webhook authentication. BodySpec base64-encodes this value and sends it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header of every webhook delivery — i.e. `Authorization: Bearer <base64(secret)>` (standard base64, with padding).

WebhookCreateRequest.title: WebhookCreateRequest
WebhookCreateRequest.description: Request model for creating a webhook.

partner_id.description: Partner ID this event is for

data.description: Event data containing user and appointment information

Webhook payload for results_ready events.

url.title: Url

Note: event_type cannot be changed after creation.
